title: Kconfig ordering fix for gateway tests
description: Tests that rsource gateway Kconfig fail via twister because LICHEN subsystem symbols (LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_CODEC, LICHEN_LINK, etc.) are not defined when gateway Kconfig's depends on clauses are evaluated. Fixed by adding rsource subsys/Kconfig before rsource gateway/Kconfig in affected tests. Affected: meshtastic_ble, meshtastic_adapter, meshtastic_gateway_adapter, meshcore_gateway_adapter, inbound_lci_location.
close_reason: Fixed: Added rsource subsys/Kconfig before rsource gateway/Kconfig in all 5 affected test Kconfig files. This ensures LICHEN symbols are defined before gateway Kconfig evaluates depends on clauses.
